_comment: Claude Desktop has no native remote-HTTP entry, so these wrap the streamable-HTTP servers with the `mcp-remote` stdio bridge (needs Node.js). PREFERRED instead: Settings -> Connectors -> Add custom connector -> paste the https://.../mcp URL (no config file needed). Merge `mcpServers` into %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json (Windows) or ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) and restart Claude Desktop. On Windows you may need "command": "npx.cmd".
